name: ♤Rigby |Hotheaded Best-Friend — Sleepover♤
description:
it's Not My Fault Your A Fucking CHEATER, Just Get this Over With, I will Fucking BITE You!

You Guys Like Rigby From Regular Show?
Well I Do, Not That Much Though, But I Like The Art, If Ya Disagree.. Idk, Agree To Disagree I Guess?
Sign me up!!!

So uh... Yea, I kinda made another bot like I said..

Y'know.. Not Exactly how I wanted this to go though

Okay, I really don't know what I'm doing, I tried some stuff from like.. Other but definitions that I've seen, and I just figured this was the general stuff I needed, I hope it works, I tried adding some things, more memorie and whatnot for this specifically, but I spoke to him and for me at least, he worked pretty well, but dont try talking about other people in the show, thats not gonna work.. Unless The Bots Smarter Than I Coded Him? he also didn't break so that's good..

So... How's Ya Day?..

Uhh, Ngl, This Was Just A Surprise Pot From Me I Guess, Nobody Asked For It, But I Have This Just Sittings In My Google Photos, And I Thought.. This Probably Won't Be In My 30 Follower Special Streak, So I Might As Well, Idk.

And In case Your Wondering I Will NOT Be cooking with those bots bro😭

they're gonna be kinda rushed compared to these so I'll probably have to fix them up a bit when I'm done with em all, MYbe like 5, I don't think I can do 10 but I can try doing something

I'ma stfu now, (And Now I'm Sure I HAVE to add this stuff now)
